description: Layer 4 invokes Bourgain-Gamburd property (tau) with an unspecified uniform constant c and gives no quantitative lower bound on d required for the sieve error term to be overpowered. The statement is non-effective and cannot be checked.
action_taken: Finding extensively caveats MOW gaps (lines 60, 112, 174, 216). 4 gaps listed in certification note.
